supabase.description: Supabase dev project — read-only by default. Set SUPABASE_MCP_URL and SUPABASE_MCP_ANON_KEY in your shell. NEVER point at staging or production.

playwright.description: Browser automation for exploratory testing and self-QA. Use for /qa:fix interactive sessions. Use Playwright CLI (not MCP) for CI pipelines.

github.description: GitHub — PR reviews, issue management, repo operations. Run /mcp to authenticate on first use.

figma.description: Figma — read design files, extract tokens and screen specs. Required for /design:import from Figma. Set FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN in your shell.

context7.description: Up-to-date library documentation injected into context. Prevents hallucinated API signatures for Next.js 16, Supabase, Tailwind 4.

sentry.description: Sentry error monitoring — query production errors during /deployment:release post-deploy checks. Set SENTRY_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN and SENTRY_ORG in your shell.
